center.name: 瓦哈卡州
center.summary: 瓦哈卡州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联43种鸟类，包括灰胸穴䳍、角冠雉、Long-tailed wood partridge等43种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Males usually arrive on breeding grounds one week prior to arrival of females. The American gray flycatcher winters in Baja California Sur, southeastern Arizona, and central Sonora to central Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: indigotica ranges in western Mexico from Sinaloa south to Oaxaca and Chiapas. The blue bunting inhabits dense vegetation such as scrubby areas, thickets, and the undergrowth and edges of tall forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: relicta is found in six southwestern Mexico states, Jalisco, Colima, Morelos, Puebla, Guerrero and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Boucard's wren is found in south-central Mexico, in the states of Puebla, Morelos, Guerrero, and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in western Mexico from Sonora south to Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|left|Notice the natural camouflage. The towhee is native to lower-lying areas from Arizona, southern Colorado, New Mexico and western Texas south to northwestern Oaxaca, Mexico, mostly avoiding the coasts

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the US and Canada breeding is done across a large portion of the west of these two countries, spanning from British Columbia to Texas, for which the grebes tend to favour larger bodies of water and congregate in large flocks. Storer and Nuechterlein in 1992 dubiously claim the birds winter in Central America, as well as in Mexico and some regions of California. Out of almost 100,000 records of this taxon logged at the Global Biodiversity Information Facility there are zero records found south of northern Oaxaca, Mexico.{{cite journal |url=https://www.gbif.org/species/2482032 |title=Aechmophorus clarkii (Lawrence, 1858) |author= |date=2017 |website=GBIF Backbone Taxonomy

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Colima pygmy owl is found in western Mexico from central Sonora south to Oaxaca, ranging from sea level up to in elevation

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crimson-collared tanager ranges from southern Veracruz and northern Oaxaca in Mexico through the Atlantic slope of Central America, to the highlands of western Panama. It inhabits the edges of humid evergreen forests and second growth, where it is often seen in pairs at middle to upper levels

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: rayi is found in Guerrero and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nelsoni is found in the southern Sierra Madre Oriental from west-central Veracruz through eastern Puebla into northern Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: minor is found from east of the Isthmus of Tehuantepec intermittently through Guatemala, Belize, El Salvador, and Honduras into far north-central Nicaragua. The nominate subspecies occurs as a vagrant in California and migrates in small numbers through western Texas. The greater pewee primarily inhabits pine and pine-oak forest in the subtropical and temperate zones. In migration and to some extent during the non-breeding season it also occurs in deciduous riparian forest within pine and pine-oak forest but not within more open areas. In elevation it ranges between overall. In the northern part of its range it mostly is found between and in Oaxaca between . South of Mexico it mostly occurs between but is found as low as

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey-crowned woodpecker is found in western Mexico from southern Sonora and Chihuahua to southern Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate grey-throated chat is found in southern Veracruz, most of Tabasco, eastern Oaxaca, and northern Chiapas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: oaxacae, Oaxaca (southern Mexico) The long-tailed wood partridge inhabits humid pine-oak, pine, fir, and montane evergreen forests with dense understories

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The lovely cotinga is found in southern Mexico from southern Veracruz across northern Oaxaca and Chiapas south of the Yucatán Peninsula

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: rayi: western Mexico from southern Jalisco to Oaxaca The Mexican chickadee inhabits pine, pine-oak, and spruce/fir forest in the subtropical and tropical zones at elevations between . In the U

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Nava's wren occurs in a small area of southern Mexico, in southeastern Veracruz, western Chiapas, and barely into northeastern Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: villai is found in southern Mexico between Puebla and Oaxaca. The ocellated thrasher inhabits a variety of landscapes including arid and semi-arid scrub and the brushy understory of oak and pine-oak forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pileated flycatcher is found in southwestern Mexico from central Michoacán and Morelos southeast to the Isthmus of Tehuantepec in Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: interior is found in south-central Mexico from Jalisco south to western Puebla and Oaxaca. T

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Chaparral nesting habitat in California This bird is found in the southwestern United States and Mexico from sea level up to , though it tends to be found between . It lives in California, southern Arizona, southern New Mexico, Texas, and central Oklahoma south along Baja California and in western Mexico to southern Puebla and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in from Colima south through Michoacán to Guerrero and east to Oaxaca and southwestern Chiapas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: occidentalis: southern Mexico in western Guerrero and Oaxaca The russet nightingale-thrush inhabits montane evergreen, pine-oak, and oak forest in the subtropical and lower temperate zones

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the west it is found from western Oaxaca in southwestern Mexico south along the Pacific slope through Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, and Nicaragua into northwestern Costa Rica as far as the Tárcoles District in Puntarenas Province. The scrub euphonia inhabits several somewhat open landscapes in the tropical zone

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: (s.) chionogaster (white-breasted hawk) occurs in highlands from far southern Mexico (Chiapas and Oaxaca), through Honduras, Guatemala and El Salvador, to Nicaragua

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: One population is found in Mexico from southern San Luis Potosi to central Oaxaca and another in Veracruz

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also has a small separate range in central Oaxaca that is not shown on the map. The striped sparrow primarily inhabits montane grasslands with scattered shrubs, pine forest, and pine-oak forest in the upper subtropical and temperate zones. Sources differ about its elevational range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Sumichrast's wren occurs in a small area of Mexico, from central Veracruz into northern Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: harrisoni is found in the southwestern Mexican state of Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in northeast, central, and southern Mexico from Tamaulipas to Guerrero and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dusky hummingbird is found in southwestern Mexico from Michoacán and Morelos to Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: cerviniventris is found year-round from central Veracruz south through Puebla and Oaxaca to northern Chiapas. The buff-bellied hummingbird inhabits a variety of landscapes in its year-round range, most of which are semi-open to open and rather dry

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is commonly found in lowland moist forest in subtropical and tropical regions up to in altitude. This species ranges along the Gulf of Mexico coast from southern Mexico, from southern Veracruz and northern Oaxaca south, to northern Costa Rica

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: genini is found in southeastern Mexico north of the nominate between San Luis Potosi and northern Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in southern Mexico (north-eastern Oaxaca and southern Veracruz east to southern Quintana Roo), Belize, north-eastern Guatemala, northern and eastern Honduras, Nicaragua, Costa Rica, Panama, western, central and northern Colombia (mainly Pacific lowlands and the Magdalena valley region), western Ecuador (south to El Oro) and north-eastern Venezuela (both slopes of the Andes and northern mountains)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nelsoni of the stripe-tailed hummingbird is the northernmost; it is found in the eastern Mexican states of Veracruz and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fulvous owl is found in highland regions in the Mexican states of Chiapas and Oaxaca, Guatemala, Honduras, and El Salvador. Its existence in Oaxaca was reported in 1950, but locations from which the specimens were collected had been challenged

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Mexico's Sierra Madre Oriental and central plateau as far south as Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The horned guan is found in the southern Mexican state of Chiapas, possibly in Oaxaca, and in southern Guatemala

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The golden-crowned emerald is found in western Mexico from Sinaloa south to eastern Oaxaca and also inland up the Balsas River basin to southern Morelos

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The turquoise-crowned hummingbird is found in the southern Mexican states of Guerrero, Oaxaca, and Chiapas. It inhabits a variety of landscapes including arid thorn, tropical deciduous, gallery, and secondary forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species inhabits amidst lush vegetation, in specially moist rainforests at high elevations (). They populate trees that make up the canopy and subcanopy of the rainforest, though they can also be found in ravines and cliffs. It prefers to live in decaying trees, stumps, and abandoned woodpecker hollows. The vivid colors of the quetzal are disguised by the rainforest. The resplendent quetzal can be found from southern Mexico (southernmost Oaxaca and Chiapas) to western Panama (Chiriquí). The ranges of the two subspecies differ: P
